description: Configure the XML Sitemap settings and generate the sitemap file. Set the Categories frequency to 'Daily' with a priority of '0.8', Products frequency to 'Daily' with a priority of '1.0', and CMS Pages frequency to 'Weekly' with a priority of '0.5'. Create and generate a new sitemap with the filename 'sitemap.xml' at the path '/'. If not logged in, use admin/Admin1234!.
